syntax.content: public class CosmosSqlGenericRepository : IGenericRepository, IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity where TDatabaseEntity : class

public CosmosSqlGenericRepository(ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, ICosmosSqlProvider provider, IEntityMapper mapper)

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities in the repository by applying the specified property assignments in a set-based operation.

syntax.content: public virtual Task UpdateSetAsync(Action> set, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional query options used to shape the update operation.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

symbols.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a single entity of type TEntity based on the specified specifications and find options.

syntax.content: public virtual Task FindOneAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of criteria used to filter the entities.
Optional find options to modify query behavior, such as sorting. If null, default options are used.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a single entity of type TEntity if found; otherwise, null.
